assertions.title: Default title for empty books is "Unknown"
assertions.evidence: Test passed. Go constructs EPUB with empty title and asserts title == "Unknown".

assertions.title: Arabic-Indic numerals converted to ASCII digits in HTML IDs
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestFixHTMLID_ArabicIndic (0.00s) with 8 subtests: arabic_indic_1, arabic_indic_9, extended_arabic_indic_0, extended_arabic_indic_9, mixed_arabic_indic, all_zero, preserve_ascii_digits, arabic_after_alpha
assertions.evidence: All 8 subtests passed covering Arabic-Indic (U+0660-U+0669) and Extended Arabic-Indic (U+06F0-U+06F9) digit conversion.

assertions.title: Dots replaced with underscores in illustrated layout HTML IDs
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestFixHTMLID_IllustratedLayoutDots (0.00s) with 6 subtests: dot_illustrated, dot_not_illustrated, multiple_dots_illustrated, multiple_dots_not_illustrated, no_dots_illustrated, no_dots_not_illustrated
assertions.evidence: All 6 subtests passed. Dots replaced with underscores when illustrated_layout=true, preserved when false.

assertions.title: EPUB version switches from 3 to 2 when no EPUB3 features needed
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestEPUBVersionSwitching (0.01s) with 2 subtests: default_epub3, epub2_desired_generates_epub2
assertions.evidence: Both subtests passed. Default is EPUB3; epub2_desired with no EPUB3 features produces version 2.0.

assertions.title: Guide section emitted only for EPUB2 or EPUB2-compatible
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestGuideSectionConditional (0.01s) with 4 subtests: epub3_no_guide, epub2_has_guide, epub2_compatible_has_guide, no_guide_entries_no_guide_section
assertions.evidence: All 4 subtests passed. EPUB3 omits guide, EPUB2 and EPUB2-compatible emit guide when entries exist.

assertions.title: NCX includes mbp: namespace for descriptions, masthead, periodical
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestNCX_MBPNamespace (0.02s) with 5 subtests: mbp_namespace_declaration, mbp_meta_description, mbp_meta_img_masthead, periodical_ncx_classes, no_periodical_classes_when_not_magazine
assertions.evidence: All 5 subtests passed. xmlns:mbp declaration, mbp:meta description, mbp:meta-img masthead, and periodical NCX classes all verified.

assertions.title: Spine includes page-progression-direction for RTL books
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestSpinePageProgressionDirection (0.02s) with 4 subtests: rtl_spine, ltr_no_attribute, empty_no_attribute, rtl_epub2_no_attribute
assertions.evidence: All 4 subtests passed. RTL non-EPUB2 gets attribute; LTR, empty, and RTL-EPUB2 omit it.

assertions.title: OPF metadata refinements for alternate-script and file-as
assertions.testOutput: --- PASS: TestOPFMetadataRefinements (0.01s) with 4 subtests: title_pronunciation_refines, author_pronunciation_refines, epub2_no_refines, author_role_refines
assertions.evidence: All 4 subtests passed. Title/author pronunciation refines emitted in EPUB3; EPUB2 omits refines; author role meta present.

assertions.title: OPF manifest item ordering matches Python
assertions.evidence: Test passed. Manifest items ordered: stylesheets, fonts, images, other resources in add order matching Python.

assertions.title: Font @font-face emission ordering matches Python
assertions.evidence: Test passed. @font-face CSS rules emitted in natural-sorted order matching Python.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: all 10 passed. All EPUB packaging tests in ./internal/epub/... passed with exit code 0.
